Our Story

Built by a shop owner,
for shop owners

BizNeighbors started with a simple observation: the people who understand your business best are right outside your door — and there's no good way to reach them.

Founder's Story

Why I Built This

I kept noticing the same pattern: storefront owners working incredibly hard, facing the exact same challenges — difficult landlords, slow foot traffic, finding good vendors — yet solving them completely alone.

The shop two doors down had figured out a solution. The restaurant across the street had a great referral network. But nobody was talking to each other. There was no place to.

BizNeighbors is that place. A verified, trusted space where storefront entrepreneurs can finally find each other, share what's working, and grow together — not in isolation.

We're just getting started, and we're looking for 100 founding members to help shape what this becomes. If you run a physical store, we'd love to have you.

About the Founder
Elena Pimenova
Former Owner of Expand.Yoga in the Mission, San Francisco
2017 – 2019

Here are some highlights from the beautiful space and community she created. Not pictured:

  • 6 month long dispute with the commercial landlord
  • Flooding
  • Low foot traffic
  • Search for a trusted helper during away times
  • And an endless quest for a quality house keeper 🙂
Our Mission

To make sure no storefront owner
ever has to figure it out alone

We believe local businesses are the heartbeat of every neighborhood. When they thrive, communities thrive. BizNeighbors exists to give storefront entrepreneurs the network, resources, and community they deserve.

🔒

Trust First

Every member is verified. No bots, no advertisers, no noise — just real business owners you can actually rely on.

🤝

Neighbors Over Competition

We believe the shop next door is your greatest asset, not your rival. Collaboration multiplies what competition can't.

🌱

Grow Together

When one business grows, the whole block benefits. We're here for the long game — community over quick wins.

The Process

How BizNeighbors Works

1

Apply & Get Verified

Fill out a short application and verify your business through your website, Google, or Yelp listing. We review every application to keep the community trustworthy.

2

Join Your Neighborhood & Industry Groups

Once approved, connect with business owners nearby or in your industry. Find your people — whether they're two blocks away or across the city.

3

Share, Learn & Collaborate

Post questions, share advice, find referrals, coordinate cross-promos, and swap resources with owners who truly understand your world.

4

Meet In Person

Take it offline. Attend neighborhood meetups, connect face to face, and build the kind of relationships that actually move your business forward.

Ready to meet your business neighbors?

We're accepting a small group of founding members who will help us shape the platform in exchange for a life long FREE MEMBERSHIP.
